allow: PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..15\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; "dashboard: $ok")

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; "dashboard: $ok"; $body = '{"clientName":"Cliente Prueba","business":"Negocio de prueba","title":"Mes 1 - Arquitectura"}'; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/projects" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "create: $\($r2.StatusCode\) $\($r2.Content\)")

PowerShell($id = "cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/project/$id" -UseBasicParsing; "project page: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/sections?projectId=$id" -UseBasicParsing; "sections: $\($r2.StatusCode\) $\($r2.Content\)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/project/$id/review" -UseBasicParsing; "review page: $\($r3.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"projectId":"cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it","message":"hola, empecemos"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "chat: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "chat error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(npx prisma db execute --stdin --schema prisma/schema.prisma 2>$null; $env:DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db"; node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\('@prisma/client'\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ const msgs=await p.message.findMany\({where:{projectId:'cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it'}}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(msgs.map\(m=>\({role:m.role,phaseId:m.phaseId,content:m.content.slice\(0,60\)}\)\),null,1\)\); await p.message.deleteMany\({where:{projectId:'cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it'}}\); await p.project.delete\({where:{id:'cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it'}}\); await p.client.deleteMany\({where:{name:'Cliente Prueba'}}\); console.log\('cleaned'\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\('@prisma/client'\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ const msgs=await p.message.findMany\({where:{projectId:'cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it'}}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(msgs.map\(m=>\({role:m.role,phaseId:m.phaseId,content:m.content.slice\(0,60\)}\)\),null,1\)\); await p.message.deleteMany\({where:{projectId:'cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it'}}\); await p.project.delete\({where:{id:'cmq777juc0002v3z8n82rq4it'}}\); await p.client.deleteMany\({where:{name:'Cliente Prueba'}}\); console.log\('cleaned'\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse app, components, lib, prisma, prompts | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\',''\)}}, Length)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse .claude | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName; Test-Path middleware.ts; Test-Path app\\api\\pdf)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force .claude | Select-Object FullName; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills" | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; "login page: $ok"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/projects" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { "api unauth: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { "dashboard unauth redirect: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) -> $\($_.Exception.Response.Headers['Location']\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "dashboard status: $\($r3.StatusCode\) location: $\($r3.Headers['Location']\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { "dashboard redirect: $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) -> $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)" } else { "error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($s = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $csrf = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/auth/csrf" -WebSession $s\).csrfToken; $body = "csrfToken=$\([uri]::EscapeDataString\($csrf\)\)&email=cliente-e2e%40test.local&password=demo-pass-1234"; try { $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/auth/callback/credentials" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "login: $\($login.StatusCode\)" } catch { "login: $\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) -> $\($_.Exception.Response.Headers['Location']\)" }; $cookies = $s.Cookies.GetCookies\("http://localhost:3100"\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }; "cookies: $\($cookies -join ', '\)"; $projects = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3100/api/projects" -WebSession $s; "projects visibles: $\($projects.Count\) — $\($projects | ForEach-Object { $_.clientName }\)")

PowerShell(node scripts/diag-deepseek.js 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20; node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\('@prisma/client'\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ const pr=await p.project.findMany\({select:{title:true,currentPhase:true,modelProvider:true,status:true},orderBy:{updatedAt:'desc'},take:5}\); console.table\(pr\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\)")

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\duver\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-duver-Desktop-Proyecto-APP-Estrategia\\248e57b3-07e0-4c87-b612-81dc19331f11\\tasks\\bn8acnyhc.output" -Tail 15; node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\('@prisma/client'\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ const pr=await p.project.findFirst\({where:{title:'Diagnóstico fase_6'}}\); const logs=await p.usageLog.findMany\({where:{projectId:pr.id},orderBy:{createdAt:'desc'}}\); for \(const l of logs\) console.log\('UsageLog:', JSON.stringify\({in:l.inputTokens,out:l.outputTokens,costUsd:l.costUsd,model:l.model}\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\('@prisma/client'\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); \(async\(\)=>{ const pr=await p.project.findFirst\({where:{title:'Diagnóstico fase_6'}}\); const s=await p.section.findUnique\({where:{projectId_phaseId:{projectId:pr.id,phaseId:'fase_6'}}}\); const d=JSON.parse\(s.data\); const ang=new Set\(d.dias.map\(x=>x.angulo.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); const fmt=new Set\(d.dias.map\(x=>x.formato.toLowerCase\(\)\)\); console.log\('dias:',d.dias.length,'angulos distintos:',ang.size,'formatos distintos:',fmt.size,'fomoConfirmado:',d.fomo.confirmedByClient\); const logs=await p.usageLog.findMany\({where:{projectId:pr.id}}\); console.log\('llamadas LLM:',logs.length,'costo total: $'+logs.reduce\(\(a,l\)=>a+l.costUsd,0\).toFixed\(4\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\)")
